title: AI's power demands give carbon capture a new push
summary:
Technology that captures carbon emissions from power plants may finally get a breakthrough as deep-pocketed tech companies try to meet climate goals while powering the AI race. Why it matters: It could help make natural gas electricity cleaner, but it's long been too expensive. The AI boom could change that.

Driving the news: At least five projects under consideration across the U.S. would capture carbon dioxide emissions from natural gas plants

title: Caterpillar Excavates Buy Zone Boosted By Nvidia AI Prowess
summary: Building on its AI partnership with Nvidia since CES 2026, Caterpillar stock digs into buy range as market rebounds.

title: Dell, HP Inc. Shares Jump on Acquisition Speculation Report
summary: (Bloomberg) -- Shares of Dell Technologies Inc. and HP Inc. jumped after a report from website SemiAccurate that Nvidia Corp. was seeking an acquisition that would “reshape the PC landscape.”The website said Nvidia has been negotiating for more than a year to buy “a large company.” Dell and HP are among the top PC vendors in the world. HP, based in Palo Alto, California, has 19% of the global market in the first quarter, trailing just Lenovo Group Ltd., which had a share of almost 27%, according

title: Is Nvidia buying a major PC maker? Why DELL and HPQ stocks are rallying today
summary: Investing.com -- Dell Technologies (NYSE:DELL) shares rose 6% Monday, while HP Inc. (NYSE:HPQ) gained 5%, following reports that Nvidia (NASDAQ:NVDA) has been in negotiations to acquire a major PC manufacturer.

title: PC stocks surge after report of Nvidia in talks to buy a PC-focused company
